mapper.select: select u.id as uid, u.real_name from nursing_elder ne left join sys_user u on u.id = ne.nursing_id where ne.elder_id = #{elderId}
select u.real_name from nursing_elder ne left join sys_user u on u.id = ne.nursing_id where ne.elder_id = #{elderId}
select ne.nursing_id from nursing_elder ne where ne.elder_id = #{elderId} order by ne.create_time asc
mapper.insert:
insert into nursing_elder (elder_id, nursing_id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) values
(#{item.elderId}, #{item.nursingId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy})
